channel.title: CyberNetSec - Data Breach
channel.description: Latest data breach threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Lending Platform Prosper Breached, 17.6 Million Accounts Exposed
item.description:
The peer-to-peer lending platform Prosper has confirmed a massive data breach that exposed the personal and sensitive information of approximately 17.6 million user accounts. The breach notification service 'Have I Been Pwned' has already incorporated the data set, which includes names, email addres...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: UK Fines Capita £14M for "Preventable" 2023 Data Breach
item.description:
The UK's Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) has levied a £14 million fine against outsourcing giant Capita for significant data protection failures related to a March 2023 data breach that impacted 6.6 million people. The ICO's investigation concluded the breach was 'preventable' and heavily cr...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Regulatory, Policy and Compliance, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: California Enacts Stricter Data Breach Law with 30-Day Notification Deadline
item.description:
California has enacted Senate Bill 446, a new law that significantly shortens the data breach notification timeline for businesses. Organizations must now inform affected California residents of a data breach involving unencrypted personal information within 30 calendar days of its discovery. This a...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Regulatory, Policy and Compliance, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Canadian Tire Reveals E-Commerce Data Breach Affecting Multiple Retail Brands
item.description:
Canadian Tire Corp., a major Canadian retail conglomerate, has reported a data breach affecting its e-commerce customers. Discovered on October 2, 2025, the incident involved unauthorized access to a single database serving multiple brands, including Canadian Tire, SportChek, Mark's/L'Équipeur, and ...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Israeli Defense R&D Firm 'MAYA' Targeted in Pro-Resistance Hacktivist Attack
item.description:
A hacktivist group calling itself the 'Cyber Support Front' has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against MAYA, an Israeli research and development firm with close ties to the country's Ministry of Defense and major defense contractors like Elbit Systems and Rafael. In a public statement on O...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Threat Actor, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: F5 Breached by Nation-State Actor; BIG-IP Source Code Stolen, CISA Issues Emergency Directive
item.description:
Application security vendor F5 has disclosed a major security breach attributed to a 'highly sophisticated nation-state threat actor.' The attackers maintained long-term access to F5's internal development environments, exfiltrating portions of the BIG-IP source code, information on undisclosed vuln...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Data Breach, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Fashion Retailer MANGO Discloses Data Breach from Third-Party Vendor
item.description:
Global fashion retailer MANGO has notified customers of a data breach that originated from a compromise at an external marketing service provider. The incident, disclosed on October 14, 2025, resulted in the unauthorized access of customer contact information, including names, country, postal codes,...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Supply Chain Attack Hits Discord: Vendor Breach Exposes 70,000 User IDs
item.description:
The communication platform Discord has disclosed a significant data breach originating from a third-party customer service vendor, 5CA. The incident, which occurred in early October 2025, resulted in unauthorized access to the sensitive data of approximately 70,000 users who had interacted with Disc...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: Clop Ransomware Claims Harvard University Breach, Threatens Data Leak
item.description:
The prolific Russian-speaking ransomware group Clop has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against Harvard University, adding the prestigious institution to its data leak site on October 12, 2025. The group, known for its 'big-game hunting' and exploitation of zero-day vulnerabilities, threate...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Threat Actor, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Discord Denies Massive Breach Claim After Hackers Allege 1.5TB Data Leak
item.description:
Discord is publicly denying claims that it suffered a major data breach. On October 11, 2025, an unknown group of hackers alleged they had exfiltrated and leaked 1.5 terabytes of user data, including highly sensitive government-issued identification documents. Some reports suggested the breach was l...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Security Operations

Read Full Article →
